body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Score 9: Bridge terms matched: kundalini, subtle energy, g-tummo, tummo, inner heat

**Awareness of Psychosomatic Medicine in Korea: Results From an Online Survey Conducted With Doctors and the General Public.** — Journal of Korean medical science (2025). PMID: 40662651. DOI: 10.3346/jkms.2025.40.e138. This study aimed to assess and compare psychosomatic medicine (PM) awareness, understanding, and related educational needs in doctors and the general public, and discuss how education for these groups should be provided. The Korean Psychosomatic Society conducted an online survey targeting 101 doctors and 100 general public, aged 20-60 years.
